name: Abosolutely Apricot Bread (Eb)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, mix together the water, bread flour, dry milk, salt, butter, and yeast until a dough forms.
3. Knead the dough on a floured surface for about 5 minutes until smooth.
4. Transfer the dough to an oiled baking dish and spread the apricot jam evenly over the top.
5. Sprinkle the dried apricots on top of the jam.
6. Bake in the oven for 30-35 minutes, or until the bread is golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
7. Allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
